joinDescription: Subscribe to Pro for global ladders, cloud backup, and ranked telemetry — built for pilots who train like machines.
proFeatureLeaderboard: Live global ladders — shard by metric, cached reads for lower Firestore cost.
proFeatureCloudSync: Encrypted-at-rest style backup slot for scores & history on your Firebase project.
proFeatureArena: Rank telemetry with best-score-only uploads and hourly upload caps.
restoreSuccess: Subscription state restored from this device.
restoreEmpty: No saved subscription snapshot found on device.
subscribeSuccess: Pro channel opening — heading to ladder.
coreRequired: Own the Core app unlock before Arena uplink can bind.
disclaimer: Billing UI ties to your storefront in production builds; this web shell simulates entitlement after Core ownership.
coreGateBody: Core unlock is required — assessment, radar, and history stay local-first without Arena fees.
